question.question_text: What will the USD/MXN exchange rate be on 2026-03-26 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: For a one-day ahead forecast of USD/MXN, the best point estimate is the current rate (random walk assumption). MXN is an emerging market currency with moderate volatility. Using historical daily volatility of approximately 0.5-0.7% for USD/MXN, I calculate confidence intervals around the current rate of 17.7666. A 50% CI uses roughly ±0.42 sigma (about ±0.43%), 80% CI uses roughly ±1.28 sigma (about ±0.86%), and 90% CI uses roughly ±1.645 sigma (about ±1.1%). Daily volatility estimated at ~0.5% of spot gives ~0.089 per day standard deviation, scaled appropriately for each interval. No major scheduled catalysts are known for this specific date, so the distribution is roughly symmetric around the current rate.
